title: Tantor (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tantor''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Tantor]]''', a [[general]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Tantor (bounty hunter)|Tantor]]''', a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]
*'''[[Brenn Tantor]]''', an Imperial general who defected to the Rebel Alliance
*'''[[Dellis Tantor]]''', Brenn's brother and an officer in [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]
*'''[[Tantor (Senior)|Brenn and Dellis's father]]''', a transport pilot for the Empire

{{Disambig}}
